input_text: Mr Dursley is an American. Estonia contains Tartu. Emajogi is 20 meters long. The woman holding a lamp sang. If an animal is cool and defeated then it is green. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Penguins live in water. John is an animal. All elephants have trunks. Emily is a cat. The head of Mary is clean. John is cool. The cake was eaten. Eve kept the milk in the fridge. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Agatha is in trouble. Mike is an animal. Sandra travelled to the office. Mike is cool. The toy of the child was broken. John is defeated. Muggles can not disappear. John is not green?
